subtitle.en: Tell us the product type, material, quantity and drawing status. We will review the project and reply with the next manufacturing step.
subtitle.zh: 请告诉我们产品类型、材料要求、数量和图纸情况，我们会评估项目并回复下一步制造建议。

desc.en: 2D drawings, 3D files or sample photos help us evaluate mold structure quickly.
desc.zh: 2D 图纸、3D 文件或样品照片有助于快速评估模具结构。

desc.en: Material requirements, finish, assembly and estimated quantity affect cost and lead time.
desc.zh: 材料、表面处理、组装和预计数量会影响成本与交期。

desc.en: Our team replies by email or WhatsApp with practical tooling and production suggestions.
desc.zh: 团队将通过邮件或 WhatsApp 回复开模与生产建议。

desc.en: Room 101, No. 606 Miaobianwang Road, Shipai Town, Dongguan, Guangdong, China
desc.zh: 中国广东省东莞市石排镇庙边王路606号101室

items.en: Product drawings, 3D files or sample photos
items.zh: 产品图纸、3D 文件或样品照片

items.en: Material, color, finish and logo processing needs
items.zh: 材料、颜色、表面处理和 LOGO 加工要求

items.en: Estimated quantity and target delivery schedule
